name: Savory Spam Crescents
recipeIngredient: 10 slice Bacon, cut in small pieces
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed - 12 oz
2 package Refrigerated crescent roll dough (8 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a skillet, cook bacon and onion until the bacon is crisp; drain excess fat.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients except the crescent roll dough.
4. Unroll each package of crescent dough and cut into 8 triangles.
5. Spread the top half of each triangle with the SPAM mixture.
6. Roll up each triangle tightly, starting from one end.
7. Place the rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
